description: Redline Stop hook — the model decides whether to review, challenge, or rescue

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{if(JSON.parse(d).stop_hook_active)process.exit(0)}catch{}try{const s=require('child_process').execSync('git diff --stat HEAD',{encoding:'utf-8'}).trim();if(!s)process.exit(0);console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Consider running a /redline:... command'}))}catch{process.exit(0)}})"
